contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Find us, call us, or reserve a table today!
contact.address: Rue de la Cathédrale 59, Liège, Belgium
contact.reservationNotice: Reservations by email are not taken into account. To book a table, please call us by phone.

about.ourStoryText1: In 2016, a young couple with a passion for Japanese cuisine opened a small restaurant on Rue de la Régence in Liège, with the support of their parents. Every morning, fresh fish is carefully selected and prepared by hand to guarantee uncompromising quality. Word spread quickly: between dine-in guests and a flood of delivery orders, the small space could no longer keep up.
about.ourStoryText2: At the end of 2024, the restaurant moved to Rue de la Cathédrale into a larger space, just steps from the original location. Today, Tokyo Sushi Bar remains a family affair where every dish is crafted with the same care as on day one.
about.ourStoryText3: In 2026, Tokyo Sushi Bar celebrates its 10th anniversary. A decade of fresh fish, refined recipes, and smiles shared with you. Thank you to everyone who has trusted us since day one, this journey is yours as much as ours.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions about Tokyo Sushi Bar
faq.schemaDescription: Frequently asked questions about Tokyo Sushi Bar - delivery, hours, halal options and more

delivery.question: Do you deliver? What is the delivery area?
delivery.answer:
Yes, we deliver from our restaurant at Rue de la Cathédrale 59, Liège. Delivery fees vary by distance:

• Under 3 km: Free (minimum 25 EUR)
• 3-4 km: 1 EUR
• 4-5 km: 2 EUR
• 5-6 km: 3 EUR
• 6-7 km: 4 EUR
• 7-8 km: 5 EUR
• 8-9 km: 6 EUR

Beyond 9 km, delivery is not available unless your order is 130 EUR or more. You can check your address when placing an order.

hours.question: What are your opening hours?
hours.answer: We are open Monday to Friday from 12:00 to 14:30 and 18:00 to 22:30. Saturday and Sunday from 12:00 to 15:00 and 18:00 to 23:00. We are closed on Tuesdays.

halal.question: Do you offer halal options?
halal.answer: Yes! We offer a selection of halal dishes, clearly marked on our menu with the Halal icon. All our halal products are prepared according to Islamic standards.

discount.question: Is there a discount for pickup orders?
discount.answer: Yes! Enjoy 10% off on all discountable items when you choose the pickup option. The discount is automatically applied at checkout.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept online payment (credit/debit card) and cash payment on delivery or pickup. For online orders, payment is secure.

allergens.question: Do you have allergen information?
allergens.answer: Our products generally contain fish, shellfish and lactose. Please inform us of any allergies or dietary restrictions in the order comments. Contact us directly at 04 222 98 88 for detailed allergen information about our dishes.

invoice.question: How do I request an invoice?
invoice.answer: All invoice requests must be made on the same day as your order. Contact us at 04 222 98 88 to make your request.

freshness.question: Is your fish fresh?
freshness.answer: Absolutely! Every morning, fresh fish is delivered directly to our restaurant and carefully prepared by our chef. We guarantee exceptional freshness and quality.

parking.question: Is there parking nearby?
parking.answer: Our restaurant is located in the center of Liège. There are several public parking lots nearby: Parking Cathédrale, Parking Opéra, and street parking spaces (paid).

accountDeletion.title: Account deletion
accountDeletion.intro: You can delete your Tokyo Sushi Bar account and the personal data associated with it yourself, at any time, directly from the app or this website.
accountDeletion.howBody: Sign in, open your account page, and select “Delete account”. After you confirm, your account is deleted immediately and you are signed out. There is no waiting period.
accountDeletion.fallbackBody: If you can no longer access your account, email us from the address linked to it, with the subject “Account deletion”. We'll delete it after verifying your identity.
accountDeletion.dataIntro: When your account is deleted, the following data is permanently removed:
dataItems: Account profile: first name, last name, email address, phone number
accountDeletion.retainBody: Order and billing records are kept for 7 years to comply with Belgian accounting obligations, as stated in our privacy policy. They are no longer linked to an active account.
accountDeletion.timingBody: Self-service deletion from the app or website is immediate. Requests sent by email are processed within 30 days.
accountDeletion.contactBody: Questions? Contact us at the address above.
